$comment: Alfred -> Cursor/Claude MCP source of truth. Template only: ${env:VAR} placeholders are resolved from Alfred's .env (or machine env) by Provision-Cursor.ps1. Path tokens (${repoRoot}, ${financeDir}, etc.) are resolved at provision time. Keys starting with _ are metadata used by the provisioner and are stripped before anything is written. NEVER put real tokens in this file.

powerbi-modeling-mcp._note: Edit live Power BI Desktop models. Auto-skipped if VS Code Power BI Modeling MCP extension is not installed.

excel._note: Read/write live open Excel workbooks. Auto-skipped if Alfred venv python or excellm is missing.

github._note: GitHub repos, PRs, issues, code search. Token read from GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN or GITHUB_TOKEN in Alfred .env.

playwright._note: Browser automation - navigate, fill forms, screenshot, reproduce UI bugs. No key needed.

context7._note: Up-to-date, version-specific library docs injected into context. Works without a key; a key raises rate limits.

markitdown._note: Microsoft MarkItDown - converts PDF, Office docs, images, audio, HTML and more to clean Markdown. Auto-skipped if uvx is not on PATH.

sequential-thinking._note: Structured multi-step reasoning for complex Power BI, Office, and PC operator tasks.

memory._note: Persistent knowledge graph for entities, relationships, and facts across sessions.

filesystem._note: Scoped read/write file access for the finance OneDrive folder and Alfred project.

fetch._note: Clean web page fetching and HTML-to-Markdown conversion. Auto-skipped if uvx is not on PATH.

time._note: Time and timezone conversion for scheduling and automation context.

sqlite._note: Local SQLite database - create, query, and analyse structured data without a server.

duckdb._note: Fast SQL analytics on CSV, Excel exports, and Parquet files.
